column1: task,freelancer,40479085,Assistant Talent Manager & Operations Assistant Needed,,"Automotive, Industrial & Agriculture",Photoshop,₹12500–₹37500 INR,,Remote,2026-05-30,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/project-management/Assistant-Talent-Manager-Operations,"Executive/Assistant Talent Manager & Operations Assistant
Location: Mumbai (Western Suburbs / Andheri preferred)

Hiring: Executive Talent Manager & Operations Assistant (Mumbai)
Looking for a fierce, highly disciplined, and sharp Executive Manager to handle operations, strategic brand growth, and backend infrastructure for an established personal acting brand.

If you are a polished media graduate or a hungry fresher looking to break into the entertainment industry, master the business from the inside out, and operate at an elite level, this is your sandbox.
Role Overview & Logistics
Location: Mumbai (Strict
Preference: Candidates residing in the Western Suburbs / close to Andheri or Goregaon due to daily travel).
Structure: 3-Month Probation Period (with a structured, clear path to long-term operational growth based entirely on performance execution).
Compensation:
Competitive Stipend + Performance-based Incentives (To be discussed during the interview phase).
Shift Timings: Standard hours start from 9:00 AM onwards (approx. 10-12 hours daily).

Note: On shoot, audition, or project production days, shifts can extend up to 12-14+ hours. This is a core entertainment industry role; high stamina, fluid adaptability, and complete scheduling flexibility are mandatory.

Educational Background:
Graduate degree in Marketing, BMM, Advertising, Communication, or Management/PR. (Polished, sharp freshers are highly encouraged).
Technical Skillset: High proficiency in building clean presentations, curating professional visual moodboards, and handling basic graphic design layouts (Canva/Photoshop).

Added Advantage: Basic proficiency with WordPress dashboards (making simple text/image data uploads, portfolio updates, and page layout formatting) will be considered a major benefit and will fast-track your application.
Essential Assets: Must own and operate a high-functioning personal laptop.
The Growth Clause

If you show absolute consistency, master the entire backend operation, and prove your irreplaceable value during the initial trial phase, your compensation will scale directly with the value you bring to the business, unlocking a structured, uncapped growth raise from the 3rd month onwards."

How to Apply:

Kishan Salam
Founder & Director
Daksh Sathi Technologies Pvt. Ltd."

task,freelancer,40480683,Brand Logo Design,,"Automotive, Industrial & Agriculture",Photoshop; Illustrator,₹600–₹1500 INR,,Remote,2026-05-31,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/graphic-design/Brand-Logo-Design-40480683,"**Logo & Brand Identity Design for Stelvane**
**About us**

Stelvane is a new brand being built for the long term. We currently manufacture industrial doors, bunk beds, and airflow structures, and we're expanding into a broader range of products. We're building Stelvane as a brand, with the ambition and identity to grow across categories and stand on its own name over time.
**Project**

Design a primary logo and core brand identity for Stelvane. The name is coined and ownable, with subtle roots in *steel* — but the identity should not be tied to any single product or industry. It should feel like a serious, confident brand from day one.
**What the brand should feel like**
- Strong, premium, and credible — built to last, not trendy
- Confident and ownable — the kind of mark you'd see on a product, a building, a delivery truck, and a website and it all feels coherent
- Category-flexible — should not lock us into doors, beds, or metal alone. Think how brands like Bosch, Honeywell, 3M, Tata, or Siemens read as *brands*, not as a description of what they make
- Modern but not trendy; clean, geometric, and timeless preferred over decorative or illustrative
- Works in a single color and at any size, from a product stamp to a building signboard
**Direction to avoid**
- Literal product icons (doors, beds, gears, hammers, airflow lines)
- Overly ""industrial"" clichés (rivets, sparks, grunge textures)
- Decorative or lifestyle aesthetics that would limit us if we expand into harder/more technical categories
**Deliverables**
1. Primary logo — wordmark, or wordmark + mark/monogram (designer's choice, both directions welcome)
2. Secondary/compact mark — symbol or monogram for favicons, social profile images, product tags, and signage where the full wordmark won't fit
3. Black, white, and full-color versions
4. Horizontal and stacked layouts where applicable
5. Color palette — primary and secondary, with hex/CMYK/Pantone values
6. Typography system — primary and secondary fonts with usage notes
7. Mini brand guideline (one-page PDF): logo usage, clear space, minimum sizes, color, typography, do's and don'ts
8. Source files in AI/editable vector, plus exports in SVG, PDF, PNG, and JPG (print and web resolutions)
9. Full copyright and ownership transferred to us on final payment
**Process expectations**
- 2-3 initial concept directions to choose from
- 2 rounds of revisions on the selected direction
- Designer to share rationale alongside concepts, not just visuals"

task,freelancer,40483889,AI Car Listing Automation,,"Automotive, Industrial & Agriculture",Photoshop; Illustrator,£250–£750 GBP,,Remote,2026-06-01,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/ai-content-creation/Car-Listing-Automation,"I run a Japan-to-UK vehicle import business and need a single programme that turns raw auction data and photos into polished, English-language listings that appear both on my own site and on major car-trading portals.
Here is the workflow I have in mind:
1. I drop the Japanese spec sheet and original images into the system.
2. The programme instantly translates every specification line and feature into clear English, then drafts engaging advert copy that highlights selling points and compliance details.
3. Photographs are batch-processed—cropped, colour-corrected, background cleaned, branded watermark added—so the cars look showroom-ready.
4. With one click the finished listing is pushed via API or secure form fill to my website and to the leading car-trading platforms I use.
Essential requirements
• AI-powered translation limited to English only (accuracy is critical—no awkward phrasing).
• Marketing text generation that sounds natural to UK buyers.
• Adjustable photo enhancement pipeline (brightness, contrast, noise removal, logo overlay).
• Automated posting module that handles login/auth and returns success/fail logs.
• Simple dashboard where I can review, edit, approve and resend listings.
Acceptance criteria
• A working prototype listing at least one vehicle end-to-end on my site and on a live trading portal.
• Source code and documentation so I can host it on my own server.
• Clear hand-off session showing me how to add new platforms or tweak the AI prompts.

Feel free to suggest the best stack—Python, Node, or another—so long as it is maintainable and leverages modern AI services (OpenAI, Google Cloud Vision, etc.) without excessive ongoing fees. I am happy to answer technical questions quickly so we can get moving."

task,freelancer,40479889,Urban Artistic Personal Photoshoot,,"Automotive, Industrial & Agriculture",Photoshop; Lightroom,£250–£750 GBP,,Remote,2026-05-30,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/photography/Urban-Artistic-Personal-Photoshoot,"I want a series of creative, highly-styled images for my own personal collection, shot against an urban backdrop. Think striking lines, textures, graffiti walls, neon signs, reflections in glass—anything that turns the city into an artistic canvas.
Here’s what I have in mind
• Purpose: strictly personal use, no commercial licensing needed.
• Style: experimental and artistic rather than standard portraits; I’m happy to play with angles, motion blur, long exposure or bold colour grading.
• Theme: unmistakably urban—streets, alleys, rooftops, subway stations, industrial zones, night lights, whatever environment best sparks inspiration.
What I need from you
• Pre-shoot call (video or voice) to bounce around concepts, pick specific locations and agree on wardrobe/props.
• On-location session of roughly 2–3 hours within the city (flexible on date and time of day to catch the right light).
• A minimum of 15 finished, high-resolution JPEGs (300 dpi, 3000 px on the long edge or larger) delivered via a shared drive or download link.
• Basic retouching plus creative colour work in Lightroom/Photoshop—skin tones natural, overall mood cinematic.
• RAW files optional but appreciated.
Acceptance criteria
1. Images are sharp, correctly exposed and free of dust spots.
2. Colour grade matches the agreed urban mood board.
3. Final files delivered within seven days of the shoot.

If you thrive on street photography, love experimenting with light, and can guide someone who isn’t a professional model into relaxed, authentic poses, I’d love to hear how you’d approach this shoot. Include a link to similar work or an Instagram feed that shows your urban style."

Project Description:
We are looking for an experienced SaaS/product video creator to produce a professional demo video for our Shopify App Store listing.

We already have a rough screen recording / YouTube demo, but we want the final result to feel much more professional, clear, and suitable for a Shopify App Store product listing.

The video should NOT simply be a raw screen recording. We want a polished product introduction video with an avatar presenter, voiceover, website walkthrough, app walkthrough, zooms, callouts, and clean transitions.
Video structure we want:
1. Avatar opening / introduction
* The video should begin with a professional male business avatar speaking directly to the viewer.
* The avatar should introduce the problem and the product in a clear, trustworthy, B2B SaaS style.
* This section should feel like a polished product intro, not a generic AI avatar clip.
* The tone should be calm, professional, and credible — suitable for Shopify merchants and ecommerce business owners.
2. Transition into website presentation
* After the avatar introduction, the video should smoothly transition into the DisputeDesk website / homepage.
* The website section should explain what the app does and why merchants would use it.
* Use clean text overlays, subtle motion, and highlights where needed.

* The video should then move into the app demo itself.
* Use the existing screen recording as reference or base material.
* Add professional zooms, pans, callouts, highlights, and transitions.
* Make it clear what the merchant is seeing and why each section matters.
* The walkthrough should feel guided by the voiceover, not like someone randomly clicking around.

* The video should include a clear voiceover throughout the website/app walkthrough.
* The pacing should be smooth and easy to follow.
* Remove awkward pauses, unnecessary sections, or anything that feels amateur.
* The final result should feel suitable for a Shopify App Store listing, YouTube, and potential customers/investors.

* Clean, modern SaaS product demo style.
* Professional and trustworthy.
* Not too flashy, but polished.
* Clear text overlays.
* Smooth transitions.
* Good use of zooms and UI highlights.
* No distracting effects.

* Final video size: 1600 × 900 pixels.
* Aspect ratio: 16:9.
* Final export: MP4.
* The video must not crop important parts of the website or app UI.
* Text must be readable.
* Audio must be clean and balanced.
* Please provide the editable project file if possible.
Assets we can provide:
* Current rough YouTube demo link.
* Original screen recording if needed.
* Website URL.
* App screenshots or screen recordings.
* Logo and branding assets.
* Script or draft script.
* Avatar / voice direction.
* Any additional copy needed for the video.
What we need from you:
* Review the current rough demo.
* Propose how you would structure the improved video.
* Create or integrate the avatar opening section.
* Edit the website and app walkthrough into a professional product demo.
* Add voiceover, zooms, callouts, transitions, and text overlays.
* Deliver the final video in 1600 × 900 MP4 format.
* Include 1–2 revision rounds.
Please include in your application:
1. Examples of SaaS, app, Shopify app, or software product demo videos you have created.
2. Examples where you used avatar presenters, AI avatars, or presenter-style intros.
3. Examples of screen recording edits with zooms, callouts, UI highlights, and voiceover.
4. Which tools you use, for example Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Descript, HeyGen, Synthesia, or similar.
5. Your suggested structure for this video.
6. Estimated delivery time.
7. Whether the editable project file is included.
8. Confirmation that you can export exactly in 1600 × 900 without cropping important UI elements.
Important:

Please do not apply if you only do basic video trimming. We need someone who understands SaaS product demos, Shopify/ecommerce software, screen recording editing, avatar intros, and professional app listing videos."

task,freelancer,40492973,Engaging Motion Graphics for Schugle,,Education & Children,After Effects; Premiere Pro,€750–€1500 EUR,,Remote,2026-06-05,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/motion-graphics/Engaging-Motion-Graphics-for-Schugle,"# Project Title
**Create German motion graphics videos for Schugle — 10s hero loop, 30s reel, 2min explainer**
NOTICE: there are bidders for EUR 1450. The budget is USD 1400! (no matter what freelancer makes of it)
# Project Description
I am looking for a creative motion graphics / explainer video freelancer to create **three related promotional videos** for **Schugle**, a German web product for teachers.
Website:
[https://schugle.de](https://schugle.de)
Reference page with existing basic tutorial videos:
[https://schugle.de/einstieg](https://schugle.de/einstieg)

The existing videos are only simple “getting started” tutorials. This new project is different. I need **promotional / explanatory clips** that make the idea of Schugle more attractive, memorable and emotionally clear.
The current website is rather factual. The videos should make the idea more engaging, while still feeling calm, credible, professional and suitable for schools.
# About Schugle
Schugle helps teachers create, formulate, structure and revise **Förderpläne** using AI.
A key idea is that sensitive pupil data should be protected before AI processing. Real pupil names should not go into the AI. Schugle works with protected placeholders instead.
The emotional idea is not “generic AI for education”. It is more specific:
**From scattered teacher notes and time pressure to clear, usable Förderplan language — with privacy protection built in.**
The video should help communicate:
* less writing effort for teachers
* clearer Förderplan structure
* AI-supported formulation
* protection of sensitive pupil data
* calm, trustworthy support for everyday school work
# Deliverables
I need three related videos with the same look and feel:
1. **10-second video**
* Also usable as a silent hero/background loop on the Schugle website
* Should work without voiceover
* Should be visually calm enough for a website hero area
2. **30-second video**
* Promotional/social/reel version
* Suitable for website, LinkedIn, social media or short ads
3. **2-minute explainer video**
* More detailed explanation of the Schugle idea
* May reuse material from the 10s and 30s videos
All three clips must feel like one coherent visual campaign.
# Language
The videos are for a German product.
* German on-screen text is required.
* I may provide or change German voiceover/audio later.
* The freelancer does not necessarily need to record German voiceover.
* However, the freelancer must understand the purpose of the German text and design around it.
For non-German speakers:
**“Schugle” is pronounced like “shoe” + the “gle” from “Google”.**

The name is inspired by **“Schule”** and **“gemeinsam”**. This does not need to be explained directly in the video, but the feeling should fit: school-related, supportive, structured and collaborative — without generic school clichés.
# Important Style Direction
Please do **not** use generic education stock footage such as:
* happy teachers
* smiling children
* classroom clichés
* chalkboards
* graduation caps
* cartoon children
* generic “school app” imagery
Schugle should feel:
* professional
* calm
* intelligent
* trustworthy
* modern
* helpful
* suitable for schools and teachers

As a reference for tone and audience fit, please also look at https://foerder-fokus.de. I like that it speaks to a German teacher / Förderpraxis audience in a calm, practical and credible way — for example around the ideas of less paperwork, more focus on the child, structure, overview and professional support. Schugle should not copy this site or its visuals, and Schugle is a different product, but the videos should aim for a similarly trustworthy German school-sector feeling, with a slightly more modern and distinctive Schugle look.
I am especially interested in visual ideas such as:
* scattered notes becoming structured Förderplan text
* anonymised placeholders replacing real names
* teacher workload becoming clearer and lighter
* AI support shown subtly, not as flashy sci-fi
* the Schugle tilted “g” icon becoming a visual motif
* text fragments transforming into calm, usable plan language
Possible visual direction:
**Messy notes → structured thoughts → protected placeholders → AI-assisted formulation → clear Förderplan.**
# Brand Assets

task,freelancer,40493508,"Streetwear Designer, Content Creator & Brand Growth Strategist (Long-Term Opportunity)",,Fashion & Apparel,Premiere Pro; Illustrator,₹1500–₹12500 INR,,Remote,2026-06-05,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/fashion-design/Streetwear-Designer-Content-Creator,"We are building a premium streetwear fashion startup focused on exclusivity, storytelling, culture, and community.
Our goal is not simply to sell clothing.

We are looking for a creative and ambitious individual who understands modern streetwear culture, Gen Z consumer psychology, fashion design, content creation, and organic brand growth.

## Our Vision
We are building the brand around a limited-drop model.
Instead of constantly releasing products, we will launch carefully planned collections and exclusive drops.
Key principles:
• Limited quantities per design
• Approximately 50 units per design
• No restocks once sold out
• Exclusive and collectible products
• Story-driven launches
• Community-first growth
• Organic hype generation

Because of this, product design, storytelling, and community building are equally important.
## What We Need Most
The most important part of this role is product design.
We are looking for someone who can create original and premium streetwear concepts that feel exclusive, culturally relevant, and desirable.
However, we do not believe great products alone are enough.
The ideal candidate should also understand how to turn the design process into engaging content and help build excitement around future drops.
We are looking for someone who can contribute across:
• Product Design
• Collection Development
• Creative Direction
• Content Creation
• Instagram Reels
• Brand Storytelling
• Community Building
• Organic Growth
The product always comes first, but we want someone who understands how great brands use content and storytelling to create demand around great products.
## Key Responsibilities
### Product Design (Primary Focus)
• Design original premium streetwear concepts
• Create complete collection and drop concepts
• Develop graphics, typography systems, symbols, and visual assets
• Create front, back, sleeve, neck label, hang tag, and packaging concepts
• Produce professional product mockups
• Research trends while maintaining originality
• Help build a unique visual language for the brand
• Contribute ideas for future collections and drops
### Content Creation & Storytelling
• Create Instagram Reel concepts
• Develop content around the design process
• Create behind-the-scenes content ideas
• Suggest product reveal concepts
• Develop storytelling frameworks around collections
• Turn product development into engaging social content
### Brand Growth & Community Building
• Contribute ideas for organic Instagram growth
• Help build anticipation before every drop
• Develop hype campaigns and launch strategies
• Suggest ways to increase engagement and community participation
• Help create demand before products are released
• Research successful streetwear and fashion marketing strategies
## What Success Looks Like
Our goal is not simply to gain followers.
We want to:
• Build a loyal community
• Create highly desirable products
• Generate excitement before every launch
• Make every drop feel exclusive
• Build anticipation and demand organically
• Create content that people actively follow and engage with
## Ideal Candidate
We are looking for someone who:
• Has a genuine passion for streetwear and fashion culture
• Understands Gen Z consumer behavior
• Has strong design skills and creative thinking
• Understands what makes fashion brands desirable
• Understands Instagram, TikTok, and short-form content
• Can create original ideas consistently
• Has strong taste and attention to detail
• Follows global streetwear and fashion trends
• Is ambitious and eager to grow with a brand
## Preferred Skills
Experience in one or more of the following:
• Streetwear design
• Fashion design
• Apparel design
• Graphic design
• Branding
• Content creation
• Social media growth
• Creative storytelling
• Video editing
## Application Requirements
To apply, please provide:
### 1. Portfolio
Share your strongest fashion, streetwear, apparel, branding, design, or content work.
### 2. Relevant Experience
Tell us about projects, brands, or pages you have worked on and your role in those projects.
### 3. Design Challenge
If you were building a premium streetwear brand focused on limited drops, how would you create products that feel exclusive and desirable?
### 4. Growth Challenge
Imagine you are launching a completely new streetwear brand with:
• 0 followers
• 0 customers
• 1 upcoming drop
How would you create enough excitement and demand organically before launch?
### 5. Drop Strategy Challenge
Each design is limited to approximately 50 units and will never be restocked.
Describe how you would build hype and anticipation over a 30-60 day period before the drop.
### 6. Content Challenge

### 7. Brand Analysis
Name 3 fashion or streetwear brands whose content and marketing strategy you admire and explain what makes them successful.
## Compensation
Budget: ₹10,000/month

As the brand grows, there may be opportunities for increased responsibilities, compensation, and involvement in future collections, campaigns, and creative initiatives.
## Important
Applications containing copied work, template-based designs, generic AI-generated responses, or low-effort submissions will not be considered.

If you are passionate about fashion, design, storytelling, content creation, and helping build a premium streetwear brand from the ground up, we would love to hear from you."

task,freelancer,40483988,Ilustraciones de Aeronaves en Vector Para Web,,General / Cross-Industry Branding & Graphics,Photoshop; Illustrator,$2–$8 USD /hr,,Remote,2026-06-01,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/vector-design/Ilustraciones-Aeronaves-Vector-Para-Web,"Diseño de Ilustraciones Vectoriales de Aeronaves para Aplicación Web
Presupuesto
USD 75
Tiempo de Entrega
4 días
Descripción del Proyecto

Se requiere la creación de 4 ilustraciones vectoriales originales de aeronaves ligeras para uso en una aplicación web. Las ilustraciones serán utilizadas posteriormente mediante programación, por lo que la estructura técnica de los archivos SVG es un requisito fundamental.
Las ilustraciones deben ser creadas desde cero utilizando únicamente las referencias proporcionadas como guía visual. No se permite copiar, calcar ni reutilizar material existente.
Aeronaves a Diseñar
1. Monomotor Ala Alta
- Inspirado en aeronaves tipo Cessna 172.
- Vista lateral estricta.
2. Monomotor Ala Baja
- Inspirado en aeronaves tipo Piper PA-28 / Cherokee.
- Vista lateral estricta.
3. Bimotor Ala Baja
- Inspirado en aeronaves tipo Piper Seneca.
- Motores ubicados en las alas.
- Vista lateral estricta.
4. Taildragger (Tren Convencional)
- Inspirado en aeronaves tipo Piper Cub o Aero Boero.
- Ala alta.
- Tren convencional (taildragger).
- Vista lateral estricta.
Estilo Visual
- Estilo semi-realista flat.
- Consistencia visual entre las 4 aeronaves.
- Fondo transparente.
- Uso exclusivo de rellenos planos.
- Sin degradados.
- Sin gradient mesh.
- Sin imágenes incrustadas.
- El sombreado debe realizarse mediante una capa independiente.
Requisitos Técnicos del SVG
Cada ilustración debe estar organizada para permitir la modificación de colores mediante código.
Zonas Recoloreables (Separadas y Nombradas)
Cada una debe entregarse como path o grupo independiente:
- Fuselaje
- Franja decorativa
- Cono / Motor / Nariz
- Cola
Capa de Sombra
- Independiente de los colores base.
- Semitransparente o modo Multiply.
- No debe alterar los colores originales de las piezas recoloreables.
Elementos Fijos
Deben estar agrupados en una capa separada:
- Ventanas
- Ruedas
- Hélice
- Tren de aterrizaje
Estos elementos no serán recoloreables.
Restricciones
- Sin piloto.
- Sin degradados.
- Sin efectos rasterizados.
- SVG limpio y optimizado.
- Todos los elementos correctamente nombrados.
Entregables
Por cada aeronave:
- Archivo SVG editable.
- Capas y grupos correctamente nombrados.
- Fondo transparente.
- PNG de previsualización en alta resolución.
Metodología de Trabajo
1. Desarrollo inicial del Monomotor Ala Alta (tipo Cessna 172).
2. Validación de estilo visual y estructura de capas.
3. Una vez aprobado, desarrollo de las tres aeronaves restantes manteniendo la misma estructura y estilo.
Uso Final

Las ilustraciones serán utilizadas en una plataforma donde determinadas partes del avión cambiarán de color dinámicamente mediante programación, por lo que la correcta separación y nomenclatura de capas es un requisito indispensable."

task,freelancer,40484641,Live2D Rigging for Animated Show Characters,,General / Cross-Industry Branding & Graphics,Photoshop; Animate,$250–$750 USD,,Remote,2026-06-01,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/2d-animation/Live-Rigging-for-Animated-Show,"Need an experienced Live2D Cubism rigger for two characters (a human male bust and a cartoon owl) for a narrated long-form show. Each bid must include: (1) confirmation of Cubism output for an offline rendered pipeline, (2) a fixed itemized quote per character, (3) timeline to a 50% WIP checkpoint and to final, (4) revision rounds included, and (5) a portfolio link showing a production-rendered rig with mouth visemes and a head turn. 广东・大湾区常驻（需高频跟随设计师前往全国各地短期出差）
岗位职责

1. 全程陪同设计师国内各地项目出差，负责行程规划、票务、住宿、交通等事务统筹与落地；

二、项目现场拍摄与素材采集
1. 出差及项目现场同步完成实景拍摄、短片录制，采集设计作品、空间细节、活动花絮等宣传素材；
2. 统一整理、分类、归档各类影像素材，保障新媒体及宣传工作正常开展。
三、新媒体运营与数码营销
1. 独立运营微信公众号、视频号、小红书、抖音、Instagram、Facebook 等国内外官方平台；
2. 围绕设计项目、设计理念、设计师个人 IP 、行业动态策划原创内容，撰写多语种文案；
3. 负责图文排版 、短视频策划 、拍摄及后期剪辑制作 ，统一并维护品牌高端视觉风格；
4. 监控平台运营数据 ，分析效果并持续优化内容策略 ，提升品牌与个人 IP 曝光度；
5. 配合品牌展会 、线下活动 、项目落地等 ，完成线上宣传推广工作 。
四 、线上商务拓展（Digital BD）
1.依托线上平台维护客户及合作方关系 ，承接线上咨询 、意向客户信息登记与初步对接；
2.收集行业资源 、市场资讯与潜在合作机会 ，整理后同步至核心团队；
3.协助完成案例资料 、宣传物料的线上分发与推广 ，辅助开展商务拓展工作 。
任职要求:
1. 此职位为月薪制；
2. 母语为粤语 ，普通话流利 ，英语听说读写能力娴熟 ，可独立完成商务沟通与英文文案撰写；
掌握基础日语者优先;
3. 常驻大湾区 ，能够接受高频国内出差 ，适应异地工作节奏;
4. 了解国有企业文化及沟通方式 ，具备商务礼仪与临场应变能力;
5. 性格开朗外向 、善于沟通 ，服务意识 、责任心与保密意识强;
6. 拥有2年及以上新媒体运营 、品牌营销 、高管 /设计师助理相关工作经验;
7. 具备基础摄影 、现场取景能力 ，熟练使用剪映 、Photoshop 、Canva 等图文及视频制作工具;
8. 热爱设计行业 ，审美在线 ，认同高端设计品牌定位，可高效兼顾多项工作内容;
9. 有建筑 、室内设计、高端地产 、文创艺术行业从业经验者优先。"

task,freelancer,40493432,High-Volume Phone Support Needed - 05/06/2026 07:08 EDT -- 2,,General / Cross-Industry Branding & Graphics,Illustrator,$250–$750 USD,,Remote,2026-06-05,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/data-entry/High-Volume-Phone-Support-Needed-40493432,"I need a reliable professional who can take the front-line phone load for my business—well over 50 calls every day—and keep the experience warm, clear, and efficient. • Maintain average call handling time without rushing the customer
• Respond to all general-information emails within the same business day, using our template library
• Highlight unresolved issues or patterns so we can improve our FAQs and scripts

I’ll provide the phone line, a shared inbox, the CRM login, and a short knowledge-base. You bring a quiet workspace, flawless spoken English, and the patience to handle a high volume of interactions with a smile."

task,freelancer,40486559,Photo & Video Library Organisation for Hospitality / Retreat Brand in Google Drive,,"Health, Wellness & Medical",Lightroom,€30–€250 EUR,,Remote,2026-06-02,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/photo-editing/Photo-Video-Library-Organisation-for,"# Freelance Job Brief: Photo & Video Library Organisation for Hospitality / Retreat Brand

By the end of Phase 1, we would like:

# Phase 2 — Ongoing Weekly Media Library Maintenance (seperate Job to be posted)
After the initial clean-up, we may continue with ongoing weekly support.
This second phase is focused on keeping the new system organised as new photos and videos are added by our team, volunteers, facilitators, and collaborators.
## Weekly Tasks
The freelancer will help with:
* Reviewing newly uploaded photo and video files in Google Drive

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY AND ORIGINAL WORK REQUIREMENTS

All custom layouts, templates, graphics, design elements, and branding materials created specifically for Salem Engineering Group under this project shall become the exclusive property of Salem Engineering Group, Inc. upon final payment.

The final design system shall be created specifically for Salem Engineering Group and shall not be based upon or substantially derived from commercially available proposal templates, stock proposal packages, or previously developed client templates without prior disclosure and written approval from Salem Engineering Group.

Any stock photography, fonts, graphics, icons, or third-party assets requiring separate licensing must be disclosed prior to use. The designer shall identify any third-party assets incorporated into the final design and provide licensing information where applicable.
No AI-generated logos, branding elements, company identity materials, or stock proposal templates shall be used as the primary basis of the final design.

The designer shall not reuse, resell, license, distribute, or repurpose the completed Salem Engineering Group proposal system, templates, layouts, or custom design elements for any other client without written permission from Salem Engineering Group.

The designer shall disclose any use of artificial intelligence tools in the design process. Any AI-generated content used must be fully editable, commercially usable, and approved by Salem Engineering Group prior to inclusion in the final deliverables.
The designer shall provide:
• Native Adobe InDesign (.INDD) files
• IDML files
• Packaged project files
• Linked graphics
• Style libraries
• Font list
• All custom graphic elements created for this project

Upon final payment, Salem Engineering Group shall receive full ownership and unrestricted usage rights to all custom designs, layouts, templates, graphics, and project deliverables created under this agreement.
The final proposal system must be fully editable by Salem Engineering Group staff using Adobe InDesign without requiring assistance from the designer after project completion.
To confirm that you have read the entire project description, please begin your proposal with the phrase:
I have read the complete project description."""

task,freelancer,40478208,Refreshing AVINSTAL Logo & Brand Identity,,"Real Estate, Construction & Property",Photoshop; Animate,€250–€750 EUR,,Remote,2026-05-29,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/branding/Refreshing-AVINSTAL-Logo-Brand-Identity,"Logo Redesign & Brand Refresh for AVINSTAL – Projection Mapping & AV Technology Company
## About Us
AVINSTAL is a technology company with more than 10 years of experience specializing in:
- Architectural projection mapping
- 3D video mapping on buildings and structures
- Professional projection systems
- Audio-Video system integration
- Multimedia installations
- Event technology solutions

Over the years, our company has evolved significantly, and we are now looking to modernize our visual identity with a professional logo redesign that better reflects our expertise, innovation, and future direction.
Our current logo is attached for reference.
## Project Objective
We are not looking for a completely unrelated new logo.
Instead, we are seeking a thoughtful and professional brand refresh that modernizes our identity while maintaining continuity and recognition of the AVINSTAL brand.
The current logo has been part of our company for more than a decade, and we would like designers to explore ways of preserving or reinterpreting the existing ""AV"" monogram whenever possible.
## Brand Positioning
The new logo should communicate:
- Innovation
- Technology
- Reliability
- Professionalism
- Precision
- Creativity
- Premium quality
Most importantly, it should reflect our specialization in architectural projection mapping and immersive visual experiences.
We want to be perceived as a cutting-edge projection and visual technology company rather than a traditional audio-video installation business.
## Design Direction
We encourage designers to draw inspiration from:
- Architecture
- Building facades
- Projection surfaces
- Light and projection beams
- Perspective and depth
- Geometric structures
- Digital transformation of physical spaces
- Projection mapping grids
- Spatial design
- Visual technology
We are especially interested in concepts where the AV symbol can subtly represent:
- Architectural geometry
- Projection mapping surfaces
- Perspective lines
- Light paths
- Transformation of buildings through projected content
The final design should be clean, modern, memorable, and timeless.
## Motion & Animation Compatibility
An important consideration for this project is that the logo should be suitable for future animation and motion graphics.
As a company specializing in projection mapping and immersive visual experiences, we frequently use animated content in presentations, events, projection shows, and marketing materials.
The logo should therefore:
- Be based on strong geometric forms.
- Work equally well in static and animated formats.
- Allow smooth transformation and animation.
- Offer potential for motion design inspired by architecture, light, projection, perspective, or spatial transformation.
When presenting concepts, designers are encouraged to briefly explain how their logo could be animated in the future.
A logo animation is not required for this project, but animation potential should be considered during the design process.
## Design Requirements
The logo must:
- Work in full color and monochrome.
- Be scalable from small icons to large-format applications.
- Be easily recognizable.
- Remain effective when used on:
- Websites
- Social media
- Company vehicles
- Workwear and uniforms
- Equipment racks and flight cases
- Technical documentation
- Business cards
- Marketing materials
- Projection screens and LED displays
## What We Do NOT Want
Please avoid:
- Generic technology logos
- Stock graphics
- Clipart elements
- Obvious speaker icons
- Microphones
- Headphones
- Television screens
- Overly complex graphics
- Excessive visual effects
- Heavy 3D treatments
- AI-generated concepts without professional refinement
## Deliverables
The selected designer should provide:
- Primary logo
- Secondary logo variation
- Icon / symbol version
- Horizontal and vertical layouts
- Light background version
- Dark background version
- Black and white version
Final files:
- AI
- EPS
- SVG
- PDF
- PNG
All source files and full commercial rights must be transferred upon project completion.
## Application Requirements
To be considered, please include:
1. A short explanation of your design approach.
2. Examples of similar branding or logo projects.
3. Initial creative direction or mood board.
4. Estimated timeline.
5. Any ideas on how the logo could evolve into a motion graphics or animated identity.
Applications showing strategic thinking and understanding of architectural projection mapping will be preferred.
## Selection Criteria
- Creativity and originality – 40%
- Professional execution – 30%
- Relevance to our industry and brand – 20%
- Communication and collaboration – 10%
We are looking for a long-term visual identity that can represent AVINSTAL for the next decade."

task,freelancer,40458351,Premium Heritage Apparel Identity System & Factory-Ready Vector Engineering,,"Real Estate, Construction & Property",Illustrator,$750–$1500 AUD,,Remote,2026-05-21,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/2d-drafting/Premium-Heritage-Apparel-Identity-System,"1. Project Overview & ObjectiveBrand Status:
Pre-launch Premium Apparel Startup (Name hidden for Intellectual Property protection).
Niche:
High-end, heritage-inspired athletic apparel (aesthetic alignment: upscale country club, vintage collegiate, luxury athleisure).
Objective:
Translate existing conceptual 3D/AI design mockups into a finalized, technically precise, and production-ready 2D vector asset system.
Manufacturing Intent:

The final vector graphics must be meticulously engineered to accommodate physical apparel manufacturing techniques, specifically high-density direct embroidery, woven patches with merrowed borders, and debossed hardware.
Note on Assets:
Conceptual designs will be shared strictly with shortlisted candidates during the interview phase under a mutual NDA.
2. Core Deliverables Matrix
The selected freelancer will deliver clean, master vector files organized into three distinct modules:
Module A:
Core Brand Identity & TypographyThe Master Crest (Refinement):

Flatten a highly detailed, 6-quadrant 3D rendered conceptual crest into a clean 2D vector artwork file. Clean up internal multi-sport icons (e.g., racquets, clubs, oars) into bold, iconic lines. Eliminate digital gradients; use solid color blocks or strategic line-weight gaps to imply depth.
Main Wordmark:
A standalone, premium serif logotype optimized for primary retail branding and woven main neck labels using our hidden brand name.
Secondary Wordmark:
A variant integrating a secondary location keyword designed for online storefronts and physical signage.
The Master Monogram:

A unique, definitive single-letter cipher derived from the brand identity. This single, definitive architecture will serve as our primary micro-mark (used for cuff embroidery, embossed buttons, zipper pulls, and pocket details) to ensure cross-brand unity.
Module B:
Local Sub-Club Patch System (5 Variants)
Scope:
Build out 5 distinct circular and shield patches based on our layout concepts for specific sporting categories (Athletic, Gridiron, Ice Hockey, Baseball, and Basketball).
Modifications:
Re-engineer the internal graphics of our concepts to meet strict physical textile manufacturing rules while maintaining the established color story and embedding the new master monogram.
3. Absolute Minimum Technical Competency Requirements:

Applicants must possess demonstrable professional experience in apparel-specific vector engineering. General web, logo, or brand graphic designers without factory production experience will not be considered. You must prove competency in:
Textile Geometry Optimization:

Understanding how physical threads pull, bleed, and warp on knit and woven textiles.Embroidery Structural Layout: Ability to design vector paths specifically layered for digitizing software (e.g., Wilcom, Tajima) to dictate satin stitches, fill stitches, and 3D foam puff applications.
Pantone Textile Architecture: Native proficiency in utilizing the Pantone Matching System (PMS) Solid Coated library for industrial color matching.
4. Mandatory Technical Outputs RequiredFinal delivery must include master files (.AI, .EPS, and .SVG) built to these exact factory parameters:

Strict Line & Space Weights: Every stroke, line gap, and negative space must be a minimum of 1.0mm to 1.5mm thick at a 3.5-inch application scale. Lines finer than this will cause thread breaks, fabric tearing, or blurred details.Zero Gradients or 3D Shading: All assets must be strictly flat 2D vectors. Shading and depth must be implied via line breaks or solid color blocking.
Production-Ready Layering: Organize all files into clearly labeled, separate layers:
column2: Layer 1: Outer Border / Placement Guide (e.g., 3.5-inch bounding box / merrowed edge template).Layer 2: Fill Backgrounds / Base Textures.Layer 3: Main Artwork, Icons,& Typography.Typography Text Traps:
column3: All text must be manually tracked and converted to outlines (Cmd+Shift+O / Ctrl+Shift+O). Kerning and tracking must be wide enough to ensure fabric color bleed does not compromise legibility.The designer must have experience designing for crest patches, other patches,and direct embroidery of the crest and monogram onto various premium clothing and apparel such as premium cotton polos heavy premium cotton rugby jerseys,premium wool knitwear,and premium caps."

task,freelancer,40486474,Grassroots Malaysian Sports Club SaaS Platform,,"Real Estate, Construction & Property",Illustrator,$750–$1500 USD,,Remote,2026-06-02,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/saas/Grassroots-Malaysian-Sports-Club-SaaS,"​1. Project Overview & Objective

​The objective is to build a localized, multi-tenant Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform modeled after MyClubPro.co.uk. The platform will allow grassroots Malaysian sports clubs (e.g., rugby, football, badminton academies) to automatically generate their own responsive club website, manage club memberships, schedule fixtures, and collect fees digitally via local payment methods.
​2. Core Architecture & Infrastructure Requirements
​To ensure scalability, security, and low operational overhead, the developer must adhere to the following stack and structural guidelines:
​Multi-Tenancy Model: Database-level isolation or highly secure single-database logical isolation (Tenant ID). The platform must seamlessly support:
​Subdomains: tenantname.ourplatform.com upon automated registration.
​Custom Domains: Mapping of external custom domains (e.g., www.clubname.my or .com.my) pointing to the tenant's site.
​Preferred Tech Stack:
​Backend: Laravel (PHP) or Next.js/Node.js or similar.
​Frontend: Tailwind CSS with Blade, React, or Vue.js for a fully responsive, mobile-first UI.
​Database: PostgreSQL or MySQL.
​Infrastructure Partners:
​Cloud Hosting: Will be by Hirer but developer can propose or suggest.
​Object Storage: By hirer but developer can propose or suggest. It is for user-uploaded media (logos, player photos).
​Security/DNS: Cloudflare integration for automated SSL generation on wild card subdomains.
​3. Detailed Feature Scope
​The developer will be responsible for building five core epics:
​Epic 1: Multi-Tenant Tenant Onboarding & Site Builder
​Self-Service Signup: Club admins can register, choose a subdomain, and instantly deploy their site.
​No-Code Customization: A simple settings dashboard for admins to upload club crests/logos, set primary/secondary theme colors, and input social media links.
​Dynamic CMS: Ability for club admins to publish news articles, create custom pages (e.g., ""Club History""), and upload media galleries.
​Epic 2: Membership & CRM Database
​Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): Super Admin (Us), Club Admin, Team Coach, Player, and Parent/Guardian.
​Member Directory: Dynamic profiles for players including positions, jersey numbers, and emergency contact details.
​Data Management: CSV/Excel bulk import and export utilities for club rosters.
​Epic 3: Fixtures, Results & Statistics
​Match Management: Interface to create schedules, match venues (with Google Maps embedding), and opposing team details.
​Match Center: Ability to input scores, match reports, and player statistics (e.g., goals, tries, player of the match).
​Auto-Generated Tables: Basic league table calculator based on inputted match results.
​Epic 4: Localized Payment & Financials (Critical)
​Payment Gateway Integration: Direct API integration with Stripe Malaysia and/or other provider.
​Split-Routing / Payouts: Architecture must support routing payments directly to the individual club’s bank account (via FPX/Credit Card) while deducting our platform's transaction fee.
​Fee Management: Admins can create payment campaigns (e.g., ""Monthly Training Fee - RM 150"", ""Annual Jersey Kit - RM 80"") and track real-time paid vs. unpaid rosters.
​Epic 5: Localization & Communications
​Bilingual Capability: Frontend UI must support toggle translation between English and Bahasa Melayu.
​WhatsApp API Hook: Integration with WhatsApp/Meta API or a reliable gateway to allow club admins to trigger automated payment reminders or event alerts directly to parents/players via WhatsApp."

task,freelancer,40483587,Creativos IA para Meta Ads,,"Technology, SaaS & Startups",Photoshop; After Effects; Premiere Pro,€30–€250 EUR,,Remote,2026-06-01,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/ai-hw-sw/Creativos-para-Meta-Ads,"Busco un/a diseñador/a creativo/a especializado/a en generación de piezas para redes sociales con inteligencia artificial, especialmente para campañas de Meta Ads, Instagram y TikTok de una clínica estética premium en Madrid.

No busco a alguien que solo escriba prompts. Busco una persona con criterio visual, sensibilidad estética, buen gusto, dominio de composición publicitaria y capacidad para crear piezas realistas, elegantes y orientadas a conversión.
La IA debe ser una herramienta, no el resultado final. Necesito imágenes, vídeos y piezas tipo UGC que parezcan reales, cuidadas, premium y comercialmente útiles.
Contexto del proyecto

Trabajamos en el sector de estética facial y corporal. Necesitamos generar creatividades para campañas de captación, redes sociales, anuncios de Meta Ads, vídeos cortos, fondos lifestyle, piezas de tratamiento y contenido tipo UGC.

La estética debe ser premium, limpia, realista, sofisticada y humana. No queremos imágenes con aspecto plástico, piel artificial, manos deformes, brillos exagerados, glow irreal, clichés baratos de belleza ni estética genérica de banco de imágenes.
Qué necesito que hagas
Necesito una persona capaz de producir:
Creatividades estáticas para Meta Ads.
Fondos hiperrealistas generados con IA.
Imágenes de tratamientos estéticos con realismo médico/estético.
Piezas con copy integrado y jerarquía visual publicitaria.
Vídeos cortos generados con IA.
UGCs o falsos UGCs publicitarios con estética realista.
Adaptaciones a formatos 4:5, 9:16, 1:1 y horizontal.
Retoque final en Photoshop, Canva, Figma, CapCut, Premiere o similar.
Variaciones de una misma línea creativa para test A/B.
Propuestas visuales alineadas con marca, no piezas sueltas sin coherencia.
Herramientas que valoramos
No es obligatorio usar todas, pero sí debes dominar varias herramientas de IA visual y edición:
Midjourney
Stable Diffusion / Flux / ComfyUI
Runway
Kling
Hailuo
Veo
Photoshop
After Effects / Premiere / CapCut
Canva o Figma para composición publicitaria
Herramientas de voz, avatar o UGC con IA si las usas
Estilo visual buscado
Buscamos una estética:
Hiperrealista.
Editorial.
Premium.
Natural.
Elegante.
Limpia.
Cuidada.
Con piel humana real, no plástica.
Con composición publicitaria clara.
Con buen uso de tipografía, aire, contraste y jerarquía.
Adaptada a una clínica estética de alto nivel.
No buscamos diseños recargados, plantillas genéricas, imágenes obvias de stock, textos mal integrados ni resultados con errores típicos de IA.
Requisitos imprescindibles
Español fluido.
Portfolio real de piezas creadas con IA.
Buen criterio de diseño.
Capacidad para retocar y corregir errores de IA.
Experiencia creando contenido para redes sociales o anuncios.
Capacidad para trabajar con una guía de marca.
Entrega de archivos finales editables cuando corresponda.
Capacidad para iterar versiones.
Criterio para decir cuándo una imagen no sirve, aunque sea “bonita”.
Sensibilidad para el sector belleza, estética, bienestar o salud.
Primer encargo / prueba inicial
Quiero empezar con una prueba pagada.
La prueba consistirá en crear:
Una creatividad estática vertical 4:5 para Meta Ads.
Una imagen hiperrealista de fondo relacionada con un tratamiento estético.
Una adaptación 9:16 para stories/reels.
Una propuesta de vídeo corto o UGC basada en la misma idea.
Entrega de prompts, herramientas utilizadas y archivos finales.
El objetivo de la prueba es validar realismo, estética, criterio publicitario y capacidad de iteración.
Qué debes incluir en tu propuesta
Por favor, responde incluyendo:
Portfolio de imágenes generadas con IA.
Portfolio de vídeos generados o editados con IA.
Ejemplos de piezas para redes sociales o anuncios.
Herramientas que usas habitualmente.
Proceso de trabajo: briefing, generación, selección, retoque, entrega.
Número de revisiones incluido.
Precio para la prueba inicial.
Precio aproximado para un paquete mensual.
Disponibilidad semanal.
Si puedes trabajar con referencias visuales y mantener coherencia de marca.
No responderé propuestas genéricas. Para saber que has leído el brief, empieza tu propuesta con esta frase:
“He leído el brief de AI Creative y entiendo que debe primar la estética, no solo la IA.”"

task,freelancer,40491787,Video promocional vertical 45-55s para app C2C con mockups + IA + voice-over humano (estilo TikTok/Reels),,"Technology, SaaS & Startups",After Effects; Premiere Pro,$30–$250 USD,,Remote,2026-06-04,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/voice-over/Video-promocional-vertical-para-app,"Proporciono acceso a la app, logo, paleta de colores y texto base. Solo necesito que combines estos elementos y aportes tu creatividad para que el resultado sea claro, entretenido y viralizable. Incluye un par de rondas de revisión para pulir detalles si hiciera falta.
1 video master vertical 9:16, duración 45-55 segundos, calidad para campaña pagada.
1 cutdown corto vertical 9:16, duración 15-18 segundos, derivado del master (mismo hook + CTA, sin los beneficios intermedios) — para usar como teaser y para iterar variantes.
1 versión cuadrada 1:1 del master, con reframing manual (no auto-crop), duración igual al master.
Voice-over en español neutro mexicano, voz femenina de 22-30 años con tono cálido, confiable, conversacional (no comercial agresivo). Ver Sección 6 sobre opciones de voz.
Música de fondo con licencia comercial (Epidemic Sound, Artlist, o equivalente con licencia clara), con build-up hacia el CTA.
SFX puntuales (whoosh, ding de notificación, badge de verificación) en momentos clave.
Subtítulos hardcoded (quemados en el video) estilo TikTok/Reels: palabra por palabra o frase por frase, tipografía grande, animación sutil (estilo Submagic, Captions, CapCut).
3 hooks alternativos (primeros 2 segundos diferentes) renderizados como archivos separados para A/B testing.
NICE-TO-HAVE
1 versión horizontal 16:9 del master para YouTube/landing (puede ser reframing con barras laterales si presupuesto no alcanza para reformulación total).
3-5 stills/posters (capturas clave del video) en JPG alta resolución para Instagram feed y thumbnails de YouTube.
Archivo de proyecto editable (Premiere/After Effects/CapCut/DaVinci) entregado al final.
CONTENIDO Y ESTRUCTURA DEL VIDEO

El freelancer recibirá un guion-base aprobado por nosotros (ya elaborado, ~45 segundos) con estructura tipo Hook → Problema → 4 Beneficios → CTA. Tiene total libertad para proponer ajustes de copy si mejoran retención, sujeto a aprobación.
ASSETS QUE ENTREGAMOS AL FREELANCER ELEGIDO
Logo en SVG + PNG (versiones blanca, negra, color).
Paleta de marca: hex codes principales y secundarios.
Mockups de la app en alta resolución (pantallas: login con verificación, badge, mapa puntos seguros, flujo de publicación con IA, vista de producto).
Fotos reales de puntos seguros candidatos.
Copy aprobado (guion + 5 hooks alternativos del documento script-App-beneficios que ya tenemos).
3-5 referencias visuales de cuentas/videos que nos gustan.
Manual de marca lite (1 página): tono de voz, palabras que SÍ usamos, palabras que NO.
Voz buscada:
Femenina, español neutro mexicano (no acento norteño ni chilango cerrado).
Edad percibida: 22-30 años.
Tono: cálido, cercano, confiable, conversacional. NO voz comercial agresiva tipo infomercial.
Referencias de tono: tutorial corporativo amigable + content creator millennial.
Opciones aceptadas (el freelancer indica cuál usará en la propuesta):
A) VO humano profesional (locutor mexicano con buyout completo). Preferida si el presupuesto alcanza.

B) VO con IA premium (ElevenLabs voz Pro MX, Cartesia, o similar) con muestra previa enviada en la propuesta. Aceptamos solo si la voz pasa el ""test de 5 segundos"" — un oyente promedio no debe poder identificarla como IA en los primeros 5 segundos.
El freelancer preferentemente debe enviar una muestra de voz de 10 segundos con el siguiente texto leído como parte de su propuesta:
Vender usado se siente como ruleta. Esta App te conecta solo con personas verificadas — porque cerrar trato con un desconocido nunca debió ser normal.""
Política de revisiones: incluye 2 rondas de revisión por entregable."

task,freelancer,40483782,PostProducción Profesional para VSL - Only Spanish Speakers,,"Technology, SaaS & Startups",After Effects; Premiere Pro,$30–$250 USD,,Remote,2026-06-01,https://www.freelancer.com/projects/motion-graphics/PostProducci-Profesional-para-VSL-Only,"¿Eres editor/a de postproducción con experiencia en VSLs, motion graphics y animación de placas visuales modernas?

Buscamos un/a freelancer responsable, creativo/a, empático/a, detallista y con criterio visual para finalizar la postproducción de un Video Sales Letter (VSL) con acabado limpio, sobrio y profesional.

El video original ya tiene recortados silencios y errores
La estructura principal ya está organizada
Lo esencial será integrar las placas visuales, apoyos visuales y finalizar el montaje profesional del VSL
Objetivos principales del proyecto:
- Incluir y animar las 102 placas o pantallas de transición dentro del VSL: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1v5HggXRsJ5GfC6xSGEjN46hvfUUIJ5EZ/view?usp=sharing

- Las 102 placas se basaron en las frases resaltadas en negrilla dentro de los apoyos visuales del guion del VSL: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1UzQnl-XwAAZF4ISkSprO6_SK3epfF3Cr/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=105006060129502884331&rtpof=true&sd=true
- Ejemplo del video en crudo (Se te entregará sin errores y silencios): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fV0fEoZD2v0-b5zRlkmTu2l-3X-L_vob/view?usp=drive_link
- Estandarizar:
Efectos
Transiciones
Tipografías
Colores
- Agregar música libre de derechos de autor adecuada al estilo del VSL
- Incorporar algunos efectos de sonido estratégicos para apoyar la experiencia visual y narrativa
- Contar con biblioteca propia de recursos visuales (videos e imágenes libres de derechos) para integrar en las partes donde los apoyos visuales del guion lo indiquen
- Mantener coherencia visual durante todo el VSL
- Entregar en alta calidad
Importante:
- Se adjunta el guion con los apoyos visuales requeridos y la referencia visual para la guía de estilo de las animaciones
- Se debe entregar una prueba o ejemplo inicial de cómo se animarán las placas antes de avanzar con el proyecto completo
- Referencia visual de estilo gráfico (ver del minuto 0:08 al 1:00):
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8eHw3FD2R1U&list=WL&index=17&t=75s
Entregables finales:
Archivo editable del proyecto (After Effects u otro software utilizado)
Video renderizado final en alta calidad

Buscamos no solo alguien que corte y pegue, sino un/a editor/a que entienda cómo mantener atención visual dentro de un VSL sin sobrecargar la edición, utilizando animaciones limpias, modernas y estratégicas.
Valoramos especialmente freelancers que sepan trabajar con ritmo, coherencia visual y acabados premium orientados a contenido educativo y de conversión.
Postúlate ahora incluyendo:
Portafolio de VSLs, motion graphics o videos similares
Ejemplo de animaciones o placas visuales realizadas anteriormente
Herramientas y software que utilizas
Tiempo real estimado de entrega
Tiempo máximo de entrega: 8 días.
Buscamos empezar de inmediato.
Cordialmente,
Roland"

Threefold Energy | London | Contract | £200–£250 per day | 3 days per week across 5 days | Initial 3-month contract
About us
Threefold Energy is a London-based clean energy technology company. We help businesses reduce energy costs and make smarter use of the grid. We are a small, focused team and we are growing.
The role
